ingredients: COMPOSITION: Chicken and turkey meal, maize, wheat, animal fat, digest, brewers' rice, maize gluten meal, dried beet pulp, minerals, fish oil, flaxseed, dried tomato pomace, dried citrus pulp, dried spinach. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Protein 27.2%, Fat content 17.7%, Crude fibre 1.5%, DHA 0.16%, Crude ash 7.0%, Calcium 1.3%, Phosphorus 1.0%, Sodium 0.49%, Potassium 0.78%, Magnesium 0.09%; per kg: Vitamin A 10,791IU, Vitamin D3 757IU, Vitamin E 690mg, Vitamin C 105mg, Beta-carotene 1.5mg. ADDITIVES PER KG: Nutritional additives: 3b103 (Iron) 67.5mg, 3b202 (Iodine) 1.1mg, 3b405 (Copper) 6.7mg, 3b502 (Manganese) 7.0mg, 3b603 (Zinc) 140mg, 3b801 (Selenium) 0.1mg; with natural antioxidant.
